title: Baseline Contract Inventory
purpose: Inventory the current S0/S0' contract surface across C, Rust, CLI, and TypeScript schemas without changing implementation. Each entry names the source file, anchored type/symbol, downstream owner, readiness, privacy class, and whether the field is authoritative, transitional, compatibility-only, or blocked on S2/S3/S5.

readiness_legend.authoritative: S0 owns this contract and produces it from real code; downstream consumers must mirror without re-deriving.
readiness_legend.transitional: S0 currently emits this field but the canonical form, schema version, or ownership is unresolved.
readiness_legend.compatibility_only: Field exists for backward compatibility; downstream should prefer a newer surface.
readiness_legend.blocked_by_other_track: Field is named in S0 contract but its final shape or runtime depends on S2/S3/S4/S5 work that has not landed.

privacy_legend.public_current_context: Safe to expose in bridge payloads, SpaceTimeDB rows, M' renderers.
privacy_legend.protected_local_derived: Derived from protected body; must not leave the local arena except as opaque handle.
privacy_legend.protected_local_body: Raw protected body; forbidden in any cross-process payload.
privacy_legend.reviewed_canonical: Published only after explicit user review.

core_types.name: KernelTick
core_types.notes: tick.cycle and sub_tick are the canonical epogdoon clock state; SpaceTimeDB must not synthesize an alternate clock.

profile_provenance.notes: Declares portal-core ownership, public-current contract name, and binary/mahamaya compatibility policy.

audio_octet.downstream_owner: DCC-05 (audio bus and cymatic derivation ownership); produced via vimarsha_read_profile in portal-core today, eventual home may be M2-1'
audio_octet.notes: engineering boundary documented under open decision; S0 currently houses the M2-1' Vimarśa reading function.

binary.notes: Compatibility alias retained during IOD-04 migration; identical to `mahamaya`.

mahamaya.notes: Canonical forward name for the M3/Mahāmāyā projection; identical to `binary` during compatibility window.

resonance.notes: Populated only via from_tick_with_personal_identity; absent in baseline public-current.

pointer_anchor.notes: Current shape lives at S0; final certification and downstream `depositionAnchor` depend on S2/S3 owners. Open decision: nullable vs readiness-blocked vs separate sub-objects.

s2_anchor.notes: Reserved for S2-certified graph anchor; null in public-current S0 profile until Track 02 lands.

s3_anchor.notes: Reserved for S3 deposition/SpaceTimeDB anchor; null in public-current S0 profile until Track 03 lands.

core_types.name: ProfilePrivacyClass
core_types.notes: Wire serialization uses kebab-case via serde rename_all.

core_types.name: PersonalIdentityProfile
core_types.downstream_owner: S0 protected arena; never leaves S0 except through handle/derived projection.
core_types.notes: Public-current baseline fixture MUST NOT carry these fields. Track 01 T0 fixture test asserts absence of natalChartHandle, qPersonal, identityHash, elementalBalance.

core_types.name: VakAddress
core_types.downstream_owner: S3 gateway `vak_address` plumbed end-to-end via sessions.patch RPC (commit 19fbc8fc) and through `epi gate dispatch anima-invoke` (commit 419aac5).

kernel_temporal_surface.name: KernelTemporalProjection
kernel_temporal_surface.downstream_owner: Envelope schema + FLOW TS interface; tauri types.ts mirror

kernel_temporal_surface.name: KernelResonanceObservation
kernel_temporal_surface.notes: S0 mirrors; S2/S3 retain schema/runtime ownership.

shared_event_surface.name: KernelProfileObservationEvent | MPrimePerformanceEvent | NaraActivityEvent | PersonalResonanceObservationEvent | RelationDescriptor
shared_event_surface.privacy_invariant: Nara activity events with EventPrivacyClass::ProtectedLocalBody must serialize with rawBodyHandle and no rawBody field.

pointer_web.downstream_owner: S2 graph layer consumes via FFI envelopes; M' renderers consume the projection in MathemeHarmonicProfile.

ts_schemas.downstream_owner: M' Tauri renderer + Theia kernel-bridge extension.

readiness_blockers_carried_forward.summary: Resolved for S0 public-current profile: schema version 1 carries both `binary` and `mahamaya` as identical compatibility aliases with explicit provenance policy.
S2 canonical `#` root mapping undecided; affects pointer_anchor S2 anchor side.
`pointerAnchor` has S0 shape; final certification + `depositionAnchor` blocked on S2/S3 ownership. Decide nullable vs readiness-blocked vs separate sub-object.
Audio bus and cymatic derivation ownership wording — engineering boundary should be documented as `S0/portal-core implementation of the M2-1' reading function` or moved if another track owns it.
SpaceTimeDB schema source, migration, and table compatibility for profile/world-clock/presence/shared-archetype/coincidence/kernel-trace streams not finalized.
`world_clock` source of truth and cadence — S0 may mirror but must not create a second world-clock authority.
Kernel-bridge host boundary (Theia ext vs Tauri Rust process vs hybrid Tauri singleton) unresolved; affects whether the typed profile contract is consumed in JS or Rust at the seam.

commands.expected: all tests pass including new track_01_t0_baseline_fixture

commands.alternate: exercises the C pointer-web through Rust FFI; treated as the C test wrapper for this baseline.

fixture_invariants_asserted: no protected_local fields: natalChartHandle, qPersonal, identityHash, elementalBalance, naraBody, journalBody
